IntentRule.min_threat_level.tooltip: The AI's threat awareness must be at least this high for the rule to apply. None = no minimum requirement.

IntentRule.min_health_percent.tooltip: Rule only matches if the AI's health is at or above this percent. 0 = any health. Use to trigger behaviors when healthy.

IntentRule.max_health_percent.tooltip: Rule only matches if the AI's health is at or below this percent. 1 = any health. Use to trigger behaviors when wounded.

IntentRule.b_requires_line_of_sight.tooltip: When checked, the AI must be able to see the target for this rule to apply. Uncheck for rules that should work off sound or memory.

IntentRule.requires_line_of_sight.tooltip: When checked, the AI must be able to see the target for this rule to apply. Uncheck for rules that should work off sound or memory.

IntentRule.observed_requirement.tooltip: How this rule interacts with the observed state (player looking at the enemy). Ignore = don't care. Required = only when observed. Blocked = only when NOT observed. Only evaluated when the active BrainConfig has bUsesObservedSystem enabled; otherwise bBeingObserved is always false upstream, making Required always fail and Blocked always pass.

IntentRule.priority.tooltip: Rules are checked from highest priority to lowest. The first matching rule wins. Use big gaps (10, 20, 30...) so you can insert rules later.

ScpBrainConfig.sight_acquire_rate.tooltip: How fast visibility score accumulates when UE sight sense is active (per second). Higher = AI detects targets faster. Typical: 0.5-1.0 for normal enemies, 1.5+ for alert/boss enemies.

ScpBrainConfig.sight_lose_rate.tooltip: How fast visibility score decays when UE sight sense is lost (per second). Lower = AI holds vision longer after LOS breaks. Typical: 0.2-0.35.

ScpBrainConfig.sight_acquire_threshold.tooltip: VisibilityScore must reach this value to transition bIsVisible from false to true. Higher = AI needs longer sustained LOS before 'detecting' you.

ScpBrainConfig.sight_lose_threshold.tooltip: VisibilityScore must drop below this value to transition bIsVisible from true to false. Lower = AI holds visibility longer. Must be less than SightAcquireThreshold.

ScpBrainConfig.visibility_multiplier.tooltip: Bonus multiplier when the AI can see a target. Higher = visible targets are much more threatening than heard-only targets.

ScpBrainConfig.threat_decay_rate.tooltip: How quickly the AI forgets about a target it can no longer perceive. Higher = forgets faster, lower = holds a grudge.

ScpBrainConfig.damage_received_bonus.tooltip: Extra threat added to targets that have hurt us. Makes the AI prioritize attackers over bystanders.

ScpBrainConfig.distance_score_far.tooltip: Targets farther than this distance get zero threat score from proximity. Beyond this, distance doesn't make them more threatening.

ScpBrainConfig.critical_threat_min_score.tooltip: Minimum target score to reach Critical threat level (also requires low health).

ScpBrainConfig.critical_health_threshold.tooltip: AI health must be below this to reach Critical threat (combined with CriticalThreatMinScore).

ScpBrainConfig.high_threat_min_score.tooltip: Minimum target score to reach High threat level.
